title: AXSchedulerSlotMouseEvent
description: Event data for slot mouse interactions in the scheduler.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Interface representing slot mouse event with event data and slot information.

data.content: interface AXSchedulerSlotMouseEvent { event: MouseEvent; slot: { startDate: AXDateTime; endDate: AXDateTime; view: AXSchedulerView }; }

type.name: { startDate: AXDateTime; endDate: AXDateTime; view: AXSchedulerView }
